analytic.title: Diiudicatio maxime probabilis plurium Observationum discrepantium atque verisimillima Inductio inde formanda
Diiudicatio maxime probabilis plurium Observationum discrepantium

biblStruct.note: DanIB WV: St.72. | Quelle: Word-Referenz DanB-Werke_St-Mm1996.docx | Rohangabe: Diiudicatio maxime probabilis plurium Observationum discrepantium atque verisimillima Inductio inde formanda: AP 1777.1 (1778), pp.3-23 - Werke 2, pp.361-375.
